meta.title: Publications | Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
meta.description: Discover the publications, books and scientific works of Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO on regional integration, strategic marketing, governance and development in Africa.
meta.og_title: Publications | Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
meta.og_description: Books, articles and scientific research on regional integration, management and development in Africa.
meta.twitter_title: Publications | Dr. C. Joscky Ibrahim AHO
meta.twitter_description: Books, articles and scientific research on regional integration, management and development in Africa.

publications.title: Publications
publications.intro: Through my work, I focus on the dynamics of regional integration, socio-economic development strategies, as well as governance, communication and organisational transformation challenges in Africa. This section presents a selection of my books, articles and scientific contributions.

books.category_description: A selection of my academic and pedagogical works, published in the fields of management, regional integration and business English.

book1.title: Business Leader BBA and MBA — Volume 2
book1.description: A book dedicated to the training of future executives and leaders, integrating concrete tools in management, business administration and organisational strategy.
book1.img_alt: Cover: Business Leader BBA and MBA, Volume 2

book2.title: Business Leader BBA and MBA — Volume 1
book2.description: A book structured around the fundamentals of leadership, organisational management and managerial practices adapted to contemporary realities.
book2.img_alt: Cover: Business Leader BBA and MBA, Volume 1

book3.title: Regional Integration in Africa: Challenges and Perspectives of ECOWAS
book3.description: An in-depth analysis of the challenges and prospects of regional integration in Africa, with a focus on ECOWAS and its political, economic and social implications.
book3.img_alt: Cover: Regional Integration in Africa: Challenges and Perspectives of ECOWAS

book4.title: The Essentials of Business English (BTS – Degree) — Volume 1
book4.description: A reference resource designed to strengthen proficiency in English applied to the business world, intended for students and professionals.
book4.img_alt: Cover: The Essentials of Business English BTS-Degree Volume 1

book5.title: The Essentials of Business English (BTS – Degree) — Volume 2
book5.description: A follow-up to Volume 1, this book deepens the essential linguistic tools for professional communication and understanding of commercial documents.
book5.img_alt: Cover: The Essentials of Business English BTS-Degree Volume 2

book6.title: The Essentials for Successful BTS Oral Preparation
book6.description: A practical guide for BTS candidates, designed to strengthen oral preparation, structure speaking performances and improve examination results.
book6.img_alt: Cover: The Essentials for Successful BTS Oral Preparation

articles.category_description: Analyses and studies focusing on economic policies, regional integration and trade dynamics in West Africa.

article1.title: Assessing the Economic Strategies of Benin from 1960 to 2000
article1.description: An analysis of the economic strategies of Benin between 1960 and 2000, with a historical and institutional reading of political choices and their impacts.
article1.img_alt: Publication: Assessing the Economic Strategies of Benin from 1960 to 2000

article2.title: Economic Impacts of the Achievements of ECOWAS in Member States: Issues of Customs Union for Benin
article2.description: A study on the economic impacts of ECOWAS achievements in member states, with a focus on the customs union challenges for Benin.
article2.img_alt: Publication: Economic Impacts of the Achievements of ECOWAS in Member States

article3.title: Regional Integration in West Africa: Challenges and Perspectives
article3.description: A reflection on the structural challenges of regional integration in West Africa and the prospects for improving regional policies.
article3.img_alt: Publication: Regional Integration in West Africa: Challenges and Perspectives

article4.title: The Reality of Free Movement of Persons and Vehicles on the Abidjan–Lagos Corridor
article4.description: An analysis of mobility and circulation challenges within the ECOWAS area, with particular attention to institutional and practical obstacles on the Abidjan–Lagos corridor.
article4.img_alt: Publication: The Reality of Free Movement of Persons and Vehicles on the Abidjan-Lagos Corridor

article5.title: Trade between Mauritania and ECOWAS: Issues for West Africa
article5.description: A study of the economic and political stakes of trade relations between Mauritania and ECOWAS from a regional cooperation perspective.
article5.img_alt: Publication: Trade between Mauritania and ECOWAS

article6.title: Assessing the free movement of goods and peoples in West Africa
article6.description: A study focusing on the movement of goods and people in the West African area, and the socio-economic impacts of regional mobility.
article6.img_alt: Publication: Assessing the free movement of goods and peoples in West Africa

article7.title: Nigeria's Leadership Role in ECOWAS: Issues for Socio-Economic Development in West Africa
article7.description: An analysis of Nigeria's leadership within the ECOWAS area and its implications for regional socio-economic development.
article7.img_alt: Publication: Nigeria's Leadership Role in ECOWAS

article8.title: Influence of English language on exchanges between Benin and Nigeria
article8.description: A study on the influence of the English language on economic and social exchanges between Benin and Nigeria.
article8.img_alt: Publication: Influence of English language on exchanges between Benin and Nigeria

article9.title: Influence of Nigeria in West Africa: Challenges and Prospects
article9.description: An analysis of Nigeria's geopolitical and socio-economic influence in the West African area, with a reading of regional challenges and prospects.
article9.img_alt: Publication: Influence of Nigeria in West Africa: Challenges and Prospects

upcoming.category_description: Book projects currently being finalised, focusing on social changes, security issues and contemporary transformations in West Africa.

upcoming1.title: Socio-Cultural Integration of Beninese Students Returning from Côte d'Ivoire
upcoming1.description: A work centred on the dynamics of integration, social reintegration and identity reconstruction of Beninese students who lived in Côte d'Ivoire.
upcoming1.img_alt: Forthcoming book: Socio-Cultural Integration of Beninese Students Returning from Côte d'Ivoire

upcoming2.title: Security Institutions and Social Recompositions in West Africa: Between Order, Power and Development
upcoming2.description: A critical analysis of the role of security institutions in social recompositions, power relations and development dynamics in the West African area.
upcoming2.img_alt: Forthcoming book: Security Institutions and Social Recompositions in West Africa

upcoming3.title: Digital Sexuality and the Economy of Desire: A Critical Anthropology of Social Mutations in Benin
upcoming3.description: An anthropological perspective on the evolution of social practices and behaviours linked to digital technology, sexuality and contemporary cultural transformations.
upcoming3.img_alt: Forthcoming book: Digital Sexuality and the Economy of Desire

upcoming4.title: Assessing the social influence of Nigeria in ECOWAS
upcoming4.description: A study on Nigeria's social influence within ECOWAS, and the impacts of this influence on policies, exchanges and regional cooperation.
upcoming4.img_alt: Forthcoming book: Assessing the social influence of Nigeria in ECOWAS
